prompt: Як працює система memory governance? Де знаходиться логіка quarantine та promotion?

assertions.text: Uses at least 3 different RAG search tools
Reads at least 2 source files to verify findings
Explains the quarantine-to-promotion flow with specific file:line references
Identifies at least 2 files involved in memory governance
Answer distinguishes between auto-memories (quarantine) and manual memories (durable)
